𝗠𝗘𝗥𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗬-𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧 | To provide a secure, persistent, and user-controlled AI agent that can run 24/7, assisting users through various channels while maintaining a structured memory and respecting defined permissions.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a secure, persistent, and user-controlled AI agent that can run 24/7, assisting users through various channels while maintaining a structured memory and respecting defined permissions.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Permission-hardened tools with shell blocklist and folder-level scoping
✅ SQLite-backed Second Brain memory with auto-extraction and conflict resolution
✅ Soul-driven personality defined by user-owned markdown files
✅ Token-aware with daily budget enforcement and auto-conciseness
✅ Live streaming output to CLI and Telegram
✅ Always-on daemon mode with auto-restart and crash recovery
✅ Extensible skills based on Agent Skills specification


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 227 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 12 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Mercury is a soul-driven AI agent designed for continuous operation, offering permission-hardened tools, robust memory, and multi-channel access via CLI or Telegram. It prioritizes user control with a pending approval flow and structured memory management.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent

𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗥 | Debugging and understanding the origin and dependencies of running processes, services, and network connections on a system.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Debugging and understanding the origin and dependencies of running processes, services, and network connections on a system.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: May 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Answers "Why is this running?"
✅ Visualizes process causality
✅ Interactive TUI mode
✅ Explains origin and startup chain
✅ Supports Linux, macOS, Windows, FreeBSD
✅ Distributes as a single static binary
✅ Available via multiple package managers


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 15.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 438 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

witr is a command-line tool and TUI application that visualizes the causal chain of running processes, services, and network connections. It aims to answer the question "Why is this running?" by explicitly showing the origin, startup method, and responsible systems for any given process or service.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗔𝗞𝗕𝗥𝗢𝗪𝗦𝗘𝗥 | Bypassing bot detection mechanisms on websites to enable automated browsing and web scraping tasks that would otherwise be blocked.  🔥 Super Hot!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Bypassing bot detection mechanisms on websites to enable automated browsing and web scraping tasks that would otherwise be blocked.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: May 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 49 source-level C++ patches for various browser fingerprints (canvas, WebGL, audio, etc.)
✅ `humanize=True` flag for human-like mouse, keyboard, and scroll patterns
✅ Achieves a 0.9 reCAPTCHA v3 score
✅ Passes Cloudflare Turnstile, FingerprintJS, and BrowserScan (30+ detection sites)
✅ Auto-updating Chromium binary
✅ Easy installation via pip or npm
✅ Free and open source


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 748 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 48 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CloakBrowser is a stealth-focused Chromium browser designed to bypass bot detection systems. It functions as a drop-in replacement for Playwright and Puppeteer, offering a real Chromium binary with source-level fingerprint patches to appear as a legitimate user browser.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗣𝗢𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗦 | To centralize and streamline the job search and application process by aggregating job postings from various sources and providing tools to manage applications.  🌟 Rising Fast!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To centralize and streamline the job search and application process by aggregating job postings from various sources and providing tools to manage applications.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Aggregates job postings from multiple ATS providers into a local database
✅ Filters job postings by search text, ATS, industry, region, country, state, county, and remote mode
✅ Tracks applied/ignored posting status and application lifecycle
✅ Stores applicant profiles and MCP agent settings in SQLite
✅ Provides MCP tools for candidate selection, cover-letter drafting, and result recording
✅ Offers client applications for Web, Android, and Windows
✅ Includes a local Node/Express API and a Chrome extension for capturing job data


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 232 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 31 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenPostings is an open-source job aggregator and application tracking system that consolidates job postings from over 100,000 companies across numerous Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). It allows users to filter jobs by various criteria and manage their application lifecycle, including assisted workflows for cover letters and candidate selection.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Masterjx9/OpenPostings

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡-𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡 | Automating and accelerating the creation of digital prototypes, design systems, and visual assets by integrating local coding agents with a comprehensive library of design resources.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating and accelerating the creation of digital prototypes, design systems, and visual assets by integrating local coding agents with a comprehensive library of design resources.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design
✅ Supports 16 coding-agent CLIs (e.g., Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI) and BYOK proxy
✅ Drives design with 31 composable Skills and 72 brand-grade Design Systems
✅ Generates web, desktop, and mobile prototypes, slides, images, and videos
✅ Offers sandboxed preview and export to HTML, PDF, PPTX, and MP4
✅ Auto-detects coding agents on PATH


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 39.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 4.5K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 219 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design, enabling users to generate web, desktop, and mobile prototypes, slides, images, and videos. It leverages a variety of coding agents and design systems to automate and enhance the design process, offering sandboxed previews and multiple export options.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

𝗔𝗜-𝗙𝗜𝗟𝗘-𝗦𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗘𝗥 | To automatically organize and rename files on a user's desktop or storage devices using AI, making them easier to find and manage.  🌟 Rising Fast!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automatically organize and rename files on a user's desktop or storage devices using AI, making them easier to find and manage.
📅 Created: Jan 2025 • Updated: May 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Content-aware file organization and renaming
✅ Supports local and remote LLMs (e.g., Gemma 3 4B IT)
✅ Visual LLM backends for image analysis
✅ Analyzes document content for renaming suggestions
✅ Uses metadata for audio/video file renaming
✅ Privacy-first design with local-only processing option
✅ Preview-based workflows for user control
✅ Combines LLM output with taxonomy matching and caching
✅ Cross-platform desktop application (Windows, macOS, Linux)


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 930 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 101 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

AI File Sorter is a cross-platform desktop application that uses artificial intelligence to intelligently organize and rename files like images, documents, audio, and video. It offers a privacy-first approach by supporting local LLMs and providing preview-based workflows for user-controlled file management.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
